inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the substance undergoing phase change

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the substance undergoing phase change
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Stoffes, der den Phasenwechsel durchläuft
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de la substance subissant un changement de phase
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de la sustancia que experimenta el cambio de fase
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة المادة التي تخضع لتغير الطور

inputs.label: Specific Latent Heat
inputs.businessContext: Energy required per kilogram to change phase at constant temperature

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy required per kilogram to change phase at constant temperature
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit sıcaklıkta faz değişimi için kilogram başına gereken enerji
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie pro Kilogramm für Phasenwechsel bei konstanter Temperatur
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie requise par kilogramme pour changer de phase à température constante
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía requerida por kilogramo para cambiar de fase a temperatura constante
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطاقة المطلوبة لكل كيلوغرام لتغيير الطور عند درجة حرارة ثابتة

inputs.label: Number of Cycles
inputs.businessContext: Number of complete phase change cycles (e.g., melt-freeze)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of complete phase change cycles (e.g., melt-freeze)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tamamlanan faz değişimi döngüsü sayısı (örn. erime-donma)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cycles complets de changement de phase (ex. fusion-solidification)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de ciclos completos de cambio de fase (ej. fusión-congelación)
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد دورات تغير الطور الكاملة (مثل الذوبان والتجميد)

inputs.label: Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Heat transfer efficiency (0–100%) accounting for losses

businessContext_i18n.en: Heat transfer efficiency (0–100%) accounting for losses
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kayıpları hesaba katan ısı transfer verimliliği (%0–100)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité du transfert thermique (0–100 %) tenant compte des pertes
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia de transferencia de calor (0–100%) considerando pérdidas
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة نقل الحرارة (0–100%) مع مراعاة الفقد

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
